message:
feat(abi): add 19 high-value symbols including getrandom, posix_spawn, statx, gettext

Tier 1 expansion adds critical missing symbols:
- RawSyscall: getrandom, statx, fallocate, copy_file_range
- posix_spawn family: posix_spawn, posix_spawnp, file_actions_init/destroy,
  spawnattr_init/destroy
- Directory: alphasort, readdir_r
- File tree walk: ftw, nftw
- i18n/gettext: gettext, dgettext, ngettext, textdomain, bindtextdomain

Totals: 646 exported (383 Implemented, 176 RawSyscall, 87 GlibcCallThrough)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
